gcp.biglake.projects.locations.catalogs..description: List all catalogs in a specified project.

required.description: Required. The parent, which owns this collection of catalogs. Format: projects/{project_id_or_number}/locations/{locatio

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.biglake.projects.locations.catalogs..description: Gets the catalog specified by the resource name.

required.description: Required. The name of the catalog to retrieve. Format: projects/{project_id_or_number}/locations/{location_id}/catalogs/

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.biglake.projects.locations.catalogs.list, iterate response["catalogs"][], extract item["name"] → fill {catalogId}
